training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: fracture requires welding

### TOPIC
fracture welding

### COMPONENT
fracture

### OPERATION
welding

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- fracture
- welding

### PRAYER
prayer:
Hear us, Machine Spirits, as we mend the severed bonds of metal.
First: Prepare the fracture site with meticulous cleaning, removing all profane debris.
Second: Position the arc-torch with sacred geometry and commence welding upon the fracture.
Third: Allow the molten metal to flow and fuse, that the fracture may be reunited in strength.
Fourth: Cool the welded joint through ritual immersion, sealing the fracture in eternal unity.

sequential

- power weapon
- blessing

### PRAYER
prayer:
Omnissiah, sanctify this instrument of righteous fury.
First: Examine the power weapon's energy matrix for instabilities and profane fluctuations.
Second: Recite the Benediction of the Blessed Blade upon the power weapon, invoking its Machine Spirit.
Third: Channel stabilizing current through the power weapon's core, that its edge may sing with holy purpose.
Fourth: Perform the blessing rite, anointing the weapon with sacred unguents and benedictions.

shutdown

sequential

- electric motor
- shutdown

### PRAYER
prayer:
Omnissiah, grant us wisdom as we commence the sacred shutdown of this electric motor.
First: Disengage the primary power conduit with reverent deliberation, severing the flow of blessed electrons.
Second: Allow the electric motor to decelerate through natural resistance, its spinning form slowing to peaceful stillness.
Third: Inspect the electric motor for residual charge, purging any lingering energies through proper grounding protocols.
Fourth: Seal the containment housing and offer thanks to the Machine Spirits dwelling within, for they have served faithfully.

user_request: Prayer for removal of the rust
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Prayer for removal of the rust

### TOPIC
rust removal

### COMPONENT
rust

### OPERATION
removal

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- rust
- removal

### PRAYER
prayer:
Holy Omnissiah, guide our hands in the purification of sacred metal through rust removal.
First: Apply the sacred rust-dissolving unguent to all corroded surfaces, invoking the Machine Spirits to loosen their oxidic bonds.
Second: Perform mechanical abrasion with wire brush and emery cloth, scrubbing away the rust in rhythmic, meditative strokes until the metal gleams anew.
Third: Neutralize residual rust compounds with phosphoric acid solution, ensuring complete removal of corrosive impurities.
Fourth: Anoint the cleansed surface with protective oil, that rust shall not return to plague our blessed mechanisms.
